title: GitHub Copilot included with every subscription
subtitle: Get a personal GitHub account with Copilot, unlimited access to all AI courses, and the workflow used by 10x developers.

copilot.headline: GitHub Copilot, on us.
copilot.lead: Every paid subscription auto-provisions a personal GitHub account with Copilot enabled. Use it inside VS Code (we recommend the Insiders build for the latest features) and pair it with OpenCode for a Claude-grade coding agent right in your editor.
copilot.footnote: Your account is ready in seconds after checkout. Find credentials anytime under Profile → GitHub.

account.title: Personal GitHub account, auto-provisioned

success.title: Welcome to Copilot
success.description: Your GitHub account is being provisioned and Copilot is being enabled. Grab your credentials and start coding with AI in minutes.

setup.title: Set up Copilot in 3 steps
setup.description: Follow our walkthrough to install OpenCode and connect your Copilot account.
setup.step1: Install VS Code Insiders — we recommend it for the latest Copilot features.
setup.step2: Sign in with the GitHub account shown on this page (copy the credentials).
setup.step3: Install OpenCode and follow the lesson to wire it up to your Copilot subscription.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our subscriptions

whatIsCopilot.question: What is GitHub Copilot and how do I use it?
whatIsCopilot.answer: GitHub Copilot is an AI pair-programmer built into VS Code. Every paid subscription auto-provisions a personal GitHub account with Copilot enabled. After checkout, your credentials appear under Profile → GitHub. Sign into VS Code (we recommend the Insiders build) and Copilot is ready: chat, inline suggestions, multi-file edits, agent mode — the lot.

howToActivate.question: How do I activate Copilot after subscribing?
howToActivate.answer: Three steps: (1) Install VS Code Insiders. (2) Open Profile → GitHub on StudiAI to copy your provisioned account credentials. (3) Sign into VS Code with that account. We also publish a step-by-step lesson on installing and configuring OpenCode — a Claude-grade coding agent that uses your Copilot subscription — inside the AI Agents course.

cancelAnytime.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancelAnytime.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your current billing period.

switchPlans.question: Can I switch between plans?
switchPlans.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Changes will apply at your next billing cycle.

refundPolicy.question: What is the refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. If you're not satisfied, contact us for a full refund.

groupDiscount.question: Do you offer team discounts?
groupDiscount.answer: Yes! We offer special pricing for teams of 5 or more members. Contact our sales team for more details.
